claims: Bab el-Mandeb disruption can affect Asian importers.
Trade exposure may be concentrated around chokepoints.
Analysts should monitor shipping rerouting and import exposure.
recommended_actions: Monitor chokepoint shipping disruption and country exposure.
baseline_summary.summary: A mainstream deep research style report says Bab el-Mandeb disruptions can affect major Asian and US-linked trade flows, and recommends monitoring shipping exposure.

payload.conclusion: likelihood_conflict and severity_conflict around Bab el-Mandeb Strait expose CHN IND USA to trade_at_risk_v and trade_impacted; analyst review action required.

path.label: Run analyst review on exposed country/chokepoint path

deep_graph_profile.path_label: likelihood_conflict -> Bab el-Mandeb Strait -> CHN, IND, USA -> trade_at_risk_v -> Run analyst review on exposed country/chokepoint path

value.label: Run analyst review on exposed country/chokepoint path

payload.recommended_action: Run analyst review on exposed country/chokepoint path
payload.title: Bab el-Mandeb Strait risk propagates to dependent countries

aletheia_graph_findings.title: Bab el-Mandeb Strait risk propagates to dependent countries

difference_table.note: Aletheia keeps field/path-level source refs; baseline depends on cited source list granularity.
Aletheia requires explicit hazard -> chokepoint -> country -> metric -> action paths.
Baseline may summarize broader context; proposed graph covers what has evidence-linked nodes and edges.
Aletheia drops claims without evidence-chain structure; baseline text is not accepted as graph fact.
Aletheia can rerun frontier expansion and compare proposed graph deltas by run key.
Aletheia attaches each action to a path and review boundary.
